prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog cover illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor: red hair, black outfit, small cross motif. The illustration should serve a personal growth story, gentle and sincere.

Scene: Avilia stands on a winding path that passes through several quiet life-stage signposts: "小学", "大学", "考研", "现在". In the distance is a high mountain, but the path has warm small lights. Avilia carries a small notebook and looks back calmly, as if telling her own story.

Core meaning: a personal journey from fear and confusion toward the ability to keep walking.

Style: clean Chinese blog illustration, lots of white space, black/red/white identity, restrained warm light, not too dramatic. Minimal handwritten Chinese labels: "回望", "继续走", "自己的高山".

Avoid giant title text, avoid sad melodrama, avoid realistic portrait, avoid cluttered timeline.
